text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for tryouts to begin. It looks like Smart Falcon will be
participating in the 1,600-meter turf race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Wait, no. I have to be positive and smile brightly—like a true Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But still... What if I fail aga—no! I can't let myself think like that! I've
been training super hard! I'm sure I'll be fine this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She still looks unsure of herself as she starts out the gate.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she runs as fast as she can, the trainers watching her remain
unimpressed.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's here again, huh? I get that she's trying her best, but
there's something missing from her running...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like the other trainer says, Smart Falcon seems to be struggling
on the track.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of the race's twelve contestants, Smart Falcon finishes in tenth
place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her placement is less than ideal, the power in her running
form drew my attention. It's not that she's missing something from her
running, but rather...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are! Aaah, I probably looked super lame back there...
Sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But hey, I heard that people like cheering on the underdog! You
know, since it's nice to see them grow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm beginning to suspect that it isn't a matter of growth, but
compatibility. Given her style of running, a dirt course might suit her
better...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...I'm no good, huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, it wasn't just today. I messed up all my other
tryouts too. I don't have anything to show for myself, so nobody wants
to scout me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know I don't have a lot going for me, but still... I want to become the
best Umadol ever!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's my dream to win races and perform winning concerts on the
biggest stages! But I can't do that on my own...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's why... I need you! I need your help to reach my goal!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Please, help me! Even a single training session would mean the world
to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words are earnest, and I can see that she wants nothing more than
to achieve her dreams. Naturally, as a trainer, I want to lend her a
hand.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?! Like, for real?! Phew... I'm so glad I asked you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to start training with you! Bring it on! Whatever it is, I'll do
it. No holding back, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, I decide to set aside the question of whether or not I'll
become Smart Falcon's trainer and focus on preparing her for the next
round of tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Nrgh! Nnnngh! Hrnng! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow, look at her doing those leg curls! Those weights look super heavy! Her smile's kinda creeping me out though...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm ready to run! ☆ Hiyayayayaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see any issues with her weight lifting or incline running. If
anything, she seems stronger than the average runner. Yet...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... H-how's my time?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... Oof... I'm not getting any better...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whenever she races on a turf course, her results are always lackluster.
My hunch seems to be right that it's a compatibility issue.

text_block_list.name: Group of Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ahhhh! Suzuka! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Excuse me, but I have to train for tomorrow's race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surrounded by the cheers of excited Umamusume, Silence Suzuka
looks somewhat troubled. Already having made her debut, she's been
putting on an impressive display across many races.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you guys! ☆ I get that you all are huge fans of hers, but you
gotta give her some space!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka's getting ready to train so she can shine during her next race!
True fans should be patient and wait to watch her then, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Group of Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
She's right...
Sorry for bothering you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Falcon... I wasn't sure what to do there...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just call me Falco! ☆ If you're ever in that kinda situation again, just
make yourself clear! They'll listen, I promise! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But I'm sure you know that better than I do...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you've got practice, right? Good luck! ☆ I'll be cheering for
you too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So... could you explain why we're here at the dirt course?!
choice_data_list: I just want to time your running here as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe a course that requires power—in other words, a dirt
course—might better suit Smart Falcon. I tell her how I'd like to
confirm my suspicions.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hrmmm... Got it! But... don't expect too much from me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hiyayayayaya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I was right. Her time on the dirt course is leaps and bounds better. She's met—no, exceeded my expectations.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...
choice_data_list: That was your best time yet!
That was your best time yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything's falling into place. I now know for certain that running on
a dirt course, which requires more strength than agility, brings out her
true potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But with that, a new question arises. Why haven't her teachers picked
up on something as elementary as this and told her about it?
choice_data_list: You should be running in dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hrk... I thought you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But... no! I can't! I can't run on dirt!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have to win on turf or this is all pointless! I don't have any other
choice!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, I have dance practice now, so let's call it here! Thank you
for today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch Smart Falcon dash across the dirt at an incredible speed, I
begin to wonder why she insists on running in turf races. Her reasoning
could be a hint to helping her grow.
